moments.title: Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow
moments.blurb: The 23rd Commonwealth Games officially opened in Glasgow, Scotland, today with King Charles III declaring the slimmed-down event open.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Buzz
angles.copy: Glasgow is buzzing! The Commonwealth Games are officially OPEN, with King Charles III kicking things off. Who's ready for 10 days of incredible sport? #CommonwealthGames2026

angles.name: UK-wide excitement
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games have officially begun! 3,000 athletes, 74 nations, 10 days of action. Get ready to cheer on Team UK!

moments.title: UK Festival Season in Full Swing
moments.blurb: Several major UK festivals, including Latitude (Suffolk), Truck (Oxfordshire), and WOMAD, are live and kicking off this weekend, bringing music, arts, and culture across the country.

angles.name: Latitude Kicks Off
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is officially underway at Henham Park! Who are you most excited to see this weekend? #Latitude2026

angles.name: Festival Frenzy
angles.copy: Glastonbury might be on a fallow year, but the UK festival scene is still delivering! Truck, WOMAD, and more are live this weekend. Where's your tent pitched?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday tomorrow, July 24, 2026.

angles.name: Happy Birthday J.Lo
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only J.Lo turns 57! What's your favourite Jennifer Lopez hit to get you on the dancefloor? #JenniferLopez

angles.name: J.Lo through the decades
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to global icon, Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday tomorrow! Wishing a fabulous day to the multi-talented superstar.

moments.title: Dry Weather and Drought Warnings Continue Across England
moments.blurb: July 2026 has been exceptionally dry across England, with rainfall at only 3% of the long-term average, leading to continued drought conditions and hosepipe bans in several areas.

angles.name: Hosepipe Bans
angles.copy: It's been a seriously dry July across England with just 3% of average rainfall! Remember to conserve water as drought warnings and temporary use bans are in effect for many.

angles.name: Devon Water Updates
angles.copy: With ongoing dry conditions, South West Water has introduced temporary use bans in parts of Devon. Let's all do our bit to save water!

moments.title: Hungarian Grand Prix this weekend
moments.blurb: Mercedes driver George Russell is optimistic for this weekend's Hungarian Grand Prix, the final race before the F1 summer break, after a reported resolution to his engine issues.

angles.name: F1 Weekend
angles.copy: It's race week! The Hungarian Grand Prix is this weekend, and George Russell is hoping for a strong performance after some car adjustments. Who are you backing for the win?

angles.name: Russell's comeback?
angles.copy: Could this be George Russell's weekend? With Mercedes reportedly fixing his engine glitch, all eyes are on the Brit at the Hungarian Grand Prix!

moments.title: New Music Friday: Charli XCX, Shania Twain & Snow Patrol
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 24, 2026, brings a host of new album releases including Charli XCX's 'Music, Fashion, Film', Shania Twain's 'Little Miss Twain', and an expanded 20th-anniversary edition of Snow Patrol's 'Eyes Open'.

angles.name: New Albums Drop
angles.copy: New Music Friday tomorrow! What's on your playlist? New albums from Charli XCX, Shania Twain, and Snow Patrol are all dropping!

angles.name: Snow Patrol Anniversary
angles.copy: Snow Patrol's iconic 'Eyes Open' album gets a 20th-anniversary re-release tomorrow! What's your favourite track from the record?

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Mick
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Rock 'n' roll icon Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday. What's your all-time favourite Stones track? #MickJagger

angles.name: Legend at 83
angles.copy: From the 60s to today, Mick Jagger remains an undeniable force. We're celebrating the Rolling Stones legend's 83rd birthday this Sunday!

moments.title: World Cup Fever Boosts UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Following England's World Cup semi-final exit, 'Wonderwall' by Oasis, 'Three Lions' by Baddiel, Skinner and The Lightning Seeds, and 'Dai Dai' by Shakira and Burna Boy all re-entered the UK Top 10 on the Official Singles Chart.

angles.name: Football's Music Impact
angles.copy: Even after the World Cup, the football anthems live on! 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' are back in the Top 10. Which one are you still singing?

angles.name: Wonderwall Resurgence
angles.copy: Oasis' 'Wonderwall' is back in the charts thanks to World Cup fever! A true 90s anthem proving its timeless appeal.

moments.title: Ryan Fox Wins The Open Championship
moments.blurb: Ryan Fox became the third New Zealander to win a golf major, securing The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale on July 19, 2026.

angles.name: Open Championship Recap
angles.copy: What a finish at Royal Birkdale! Congratulations to Ryan Fox, the new Champion Golfer of the Year, winning The 154th Open.

angles.name: Fox's Historic Win
angles.copy: New Zealand's Ryan Fox made history on Sunday, clinching The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale. A truly memorable major victory!

moments.title: Ricky Gervais' 'Alley Cats' coming to Netflix UK
moments.blurb: Ricky Gervais' new adult animated series 'Alley Cats' is set to premiere on Netflix UK on August 7, 2026, featuring many of his former 'After Life' stars.

angles.name: Gervais on Netflix
angles.copy: Get ready for more Ricky Gervais! His new animated series 'Alley Cats' drops on Netflix UK on August 7th. Who's excited?

angles.name: Foul-mouthed Felines
angles.copy: Ricky Gervais reunites his 'After Life' cast for 'Alley Cats', a new adult animated comedy about feral cats. Coming to Netflix UK August 7th!

moments.title: Donnie Wahlberg turns 57
moments.blurb: New Kids on the Block star and actor Donnie Wahlberg celebrates his 57th birthday on July 27, 2026.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Donnie
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 57th birthday to New Kids on the Block legend, Donnie Wahlberg, this Monday! What's your favourite NKOTB track?

angles.name: Still a Blockhead
angles.copy: From boyband heartthrob to acting star, Donnie Wahlberg turns 57 on July 27th! Celebrate with some classic New Kids on the Block.

moments.title: Major UK Festivals Approaching
moments.blurb: The Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival (Scotland), Y-Not Festival (Derbyshire), and Camp Bestival Dorset are all set to kick off from July 30th, featuring acts like James, The Human League, Bastille, and Fatboy Slim.

angles.name: Scottish Festival
angles.copy: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival starts next week! Who's heading to the Highlands for James and The Human League?

angles.name: Summer Festival Vibes
angles.copy: More festival fun is on the way! Y-Not Festival and Camp Bestival Dorset kick off next week with some massive names. Which one are you going to?
